'''wapozo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:beadmaking|beadmaking]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-p-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:beadmaking|beadmaking]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| wapozo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:wæpezeth|wæpezeth]] || [[word:wæpezej|wæpezej]] || [[word:wæpezesh|wæpezesh]] || [[word:wæpeze|wæpeze]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:wapopozoth|wapopozoth]] || [[word:wapopozoj|wapopozoj]] || [[word:wapopozosh|wapopozosh]] || [[word:wapopozo|wapopozo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:wapozoth|wapozoth]] || [[word:wapozoj|wapozoj]] || [[word:wapozosh|wapozosh]] || [[word:wapozo|wapozo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:wapofzoth|wapofzoth]] || [[word:wapofzoj|wapofzoj]] || [[word:wapofzosh|wapofzosh]] || [[word:wapofzof|wapofzof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:wapozotho|wapozotho]] || [[word:wapozojo|wapozojo]] || [[word:wapozosho|wapozosho]] || [[word:wapozoko|wapozoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:wapozoth|wapozoth]] || [[word:wapozoj|wapozoj]] || [[word:wapozosh|wapozosh]] || [[word:wapozo|wapozo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:wapozothol|wapozothol]] || [[word:wapozojol|wapozojol]] || [[word:wapozoshol|wapozoshol]] || [[word:wapozokol|wapozokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:wapozothotho|wapozothotho]] || [[word:wapozojojo|wapozojojo]] || [[word:wapozoshosho|wapozoshosho]] || [[word:wapozoko|wapozoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:wapozothon|wapozothon]] || [[word:wapozojon|wapozojon]] || [[word:wapozoshon|wapozoshon]] || [[word:wapozokon|wapozokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:wapozothoro|wapozothoro]] || [[word:wapozojoro|wapozojoro]] || [[word:wapozoshoro|wapozoshoro]] || [[word:wapozokoro|wapozokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
